---
title: "General Methylation Analysis"
author: "Jonathan Serrano"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output: 
    html_document: 
      theme: cerulean
      toc: yes
      highlight: tango
      fig_width: 15
      fig_height: 10
      keep_md: yes
      df_print: paged
dev: 'png'
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
df_print: paged
---
<style type="text/css">
h1.title{color: white; background-image: linear-gradient(to right, indigo, indigo, indigo, white, white); border-radius:18px; padding:5px; border-padding:6px;}
</style>
<style>
body {font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;padding: 10px}
hr.dashed {border-top: 3px dashed #bbb;}
hr.dotted {border-top: 3px dotted #bbb;}
hr.solid {border-top: 3px solid #bbb;}
hr.rounded {border-top: 8px solid #bbb; border-radius: 5px;}
div.main-container {max-width: 96% !important; margin-left: 20px;padding: 10px;}
</style>

<style type="text/css">
.main-container {max-width: 98% !important; margin-left:15px; padding: 10px;}
div.main-container{max-width: 98% !important;margin-left: 10px;padding: 10px;}
div.container-fluid{max-width: 98% !important; margin-left: 10px;padding: 10px;}
ul.no-bullets {list-style-type: none;}
</style>

<hr class="solid">

<p style="color:saddlebrown; font-size: 24px;text-align: right;">
Deadline: USCAP 9/28/2021
</p>
# Project Goals {.tabset}
## Hypothesis
<p style="font-size:14px; border-radius:10px; border-width:2px; border-style:solid; border-color:rgb(192,192,192); padding:15px;border-padding:10px">
   H1. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.<br>
   H2. Differential methylation patterns can distinguish and classify "Tumor A" into tumor A1 or tumor A2<br>
   H3. Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea commodo consequat. 
</p>

<hr class="solid">

## Summary
<p>NYU in-house cohort of samples, which include a baseline ... tumors, ....which are labeled as Controls. 
For each tumor type, there is ....
</p>
<p>**Four Reference (control) Groups:**</p>

* Tumor Name A ()
    + tumor description
* Tumor Name A ()
    + subdivided into type 1, type 2, and just papillary (mixed histology)
* Tumor Name A
    + description
* Tumor Name A ()
    + Tumor Name A description 
* Tumor Name A (description)
    + Tumor type info
* Tumor Name A
    + Tumor Name A description 
* Tumor Name A (description)
    + Tumor specific subtype info
 
## Questions
1. DNA methylation landscape of sample tumors. **A, B, and C** are **Controls** and .... **D, E, and F** tumor samples: similar or distinct clusters?<br>
    a.) Master heatmap and analysis of methylation using **ABCDEF** samples 
    b.) Heatmap and analysis of methylation using only **AB and F** samples 

* **Expected results:**
ABC# of major clusters based on histological type of tumor. Perhaps sub-clusters of Control groups within each tumor type: this would show that B is already molecularly different from controls
 
1. Do the control groups cluster with each tumor type distinctly?<br>
    a.) .... analysis tumor bases (3 heatmaps)<br>
    b.) second point example<br>
    
2. Just using Tumor Name A and Tumor Name B as control groups, can we add Tumor Name B to cluster? <br>
    a.) Compare Tumor Name A and Tumor Name B, excluding Tumor Name C <br>
    b.) Add Tumor Name D to cluster <br>    
    
Copy number frequency plots

* **Expected results:**
1. Chromosomes A, B, C, and D have gains and E and F have loss<br>
    a.) .... analysis specifically chromosomes <br>
    b.) second point example<br>

## References

<p style= "font-size:12px">
(see Paper example links, https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/)
</p>

# Sample Information Sheet
```{r setup, include=FALSE, cache=TRUE}
gb <- globalenv(); assign("gb", gb)
# https://bookdown.org/yihui/rmarkdown-cookbook/custom-knit.html
supM <- function(sobj){return(suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(sobj)))}

mainHub = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/NYU-Molecular-Pathology/Methylation/main/Research/"
rFiles = c("loadPacks.R", "getRGsetBetas.R", "TsnePlotter.R", "getIdatFiles.R", "hmFunctions.R", 
             "plotlyBetas.R", "cnvFunctions.R", "tableMaker.R")
sourceScripts <- function(mainHub,rFiles) {
  scripts = paste0(mainHub, rFiles)
  suppressWarnings(invisible(lapply(scripts, function(i) {devtools::source_url(i)})))
}
sourceScripts(mainHub,rFiles)
if(!require("librarian")){install.packages("librarian", dependencies=T, verbose=T, Ncpus = 6, quiet=T)}
pkgs <- c("animation","tidyverse","knitr","kableExtra","readr","ggplot2","tidyr","foreach",
          "dplyr","BiocManager","BiocVersion","GenVisR","conumee","enrichplot","limma", "Biobase",
          "stringr","enrichplot","ComplexHeatmap","assertr","grid","gridExtra","ggnewscale","DOSE",
          "parallel","iterators","doParallel")
librarian::shelf(pkgs, ask=F, warn.conflicts=F)
animation::ani.options(autobrowse = FALSE); options(width=1400)
library("mnp.v11b6")
set.seed(1234);knitr::opts_chunk$set(rows.print=20)
```

```{r, label='Input Params', echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, cache=FALSE, error=FALSE, out.width='50%'}
# Input Parameter Names ----- 
runDir <- "~/Documents/ProjectName_date"
samsheet <- "samplesheet_Nov30.csv" # primary samplesheets name/path

# Parameters Assigned -----
gb$setDirectory(runDir)
targets <- read.csv(samsheet, strip.white=T)

# cvs column names to subset samples -----
col_samNames <- "Sample_Name" # column containing unique sample IDS
col_samTyp <- "Type" # groupings of sample kinds
col_samGrp <- "Tumor" # header for sample groups/subtypes
col_samGroup<-"Tumor" # header for sample groups/subtypes
col_sentrix <- "SentrixID_Pos" # header name containing the sentrix ID
col_other <- "Type" # any additional columns you would like to colorize/label in plots
batchCorrect <- F # Do your samples need to be batch corrected?
selectedVars <- c("Type", "Tumor") # vector of names of columns you want to target

#Filter any targets here as target1, target2, etc
targets1 <- targets #[targets$Type!="Papillary adenoma"& targets$Type!="PRNRP",]
targets[ , col_samGrp] <- "SampleGroup1" # All same group one group of samples vs types
gb$makeDt(targets) # prints out the samplesheet info in html
```

```{r, label='Input Plot Params', include=FALSE}
varProbes <- c(100, 1000, 10000) # Which top Variance probes to pull i.e. can be just c(100, 1000)
topN = 1000
mdsTitle <- paste("Top", topN, "Common", "mSet Sq.beta", "MDS plot")

# Output files names
td <- "Dec_16" #format(Sys.Date(),"%b%d")  # Today's date (MonthDay)
cnvFile <- paste0("cnv_details_",td,".csv")
segFile <- paste0("segmentsAll_",td,".csv")
seg_clust_file <- paste0("data_seg_clusters_", td,".txt")

unbetaOut <-paste0("unsupervisedBetas_", td,".rds")
supbetaOut <-paste0("supervisedBetas_", td,".rds")
annotFi <- "annotations.rds"

#Filter any targets
targets1 <- targets #[targets$Type!="Sample2",] #targets$Type!="cancer name"&

# Output File Parameter Names -----

rgOut <- paste0(td,"_RGset.rds") # output name of the RG data set
rawBetaFi <- paste0(td,"_betaRaw2.rds")

# Plot Parameter Names -----
clusterTitle <- c("Unsupervised", "Supervised") # Remove [1] for both supervised and unsupervised
titleMain <- "Clustering of tumors:\nBy Type Top"

gb$makeDt(targets)
#gb$smallTab(targets)
```

```{r, label='Assign Params', echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, cache=FALSE, error=FALSE}
samNames <- targets[ ,col_samNames]
targets[ , col_samGroup] <- "SampleGroup1" # All same group
targets$Sample_ID <- samNames
targets$Sample_Group <- targets[,col_other]

write.csv(targets, file="samplesheet.csv", quote=F, row.names=F)
targets <- as.data.frame(read.csv("samplesheet.csv", strip.white=T, row.names=NULL))
## Assign Target idat basename --------
sentrixColumn <- grepl(col_sentrix, colnames(targets))
targets$Basename <- file.path(gb$runDir, targets[, sentrixColumn])
assign("runDir",runDir)
assign("targets", targets)
```
```{r, label='Optional Plot data files', include=FALSE}
# Default output names by date run
mbfile <- "mSetSq.beta.rds"
unbetaOut <-"unsupervisedBetas_Jan21.rds"
supbetaOut <-"supervisedBetas_Jan21.rds"

# MDS default top N points and plot tiltle
topN = 1000
mdsTitle <- paste("Top", topN, "Common", "mSet Sq.beta", "MDS plot")

# CNV output file names  --------------------
fiTd <- "dec14" #Sys.Date()for saving output
annotFi <- "annotations.rds"
cnvFile <- paste0("cnv_details_", fiTd, ".csv")
segFile <- paste0("segmentsAll_", fiTd, ".csv")
seg_clust_file <- paste0("data_seg_clusters_",fiTd,".txt")
gsetFile <- paste0("gsetfunnorm",td,".rds")
gBetaFile  <- paste0("gsetbeta",td,".rds")
ClusfiNam <- paste0("dmp_kyung_",td,".csv")

# HeatMaps
geneNamesHeatMap <- F # Do you want to annotate the gene/probe names on heatmap y-axis?

# change any of the chunks below to eval=TRUE to enable/disable plot types
```
```{r, label='Assign Params'}
samNames <- targets[ ,col_samNames]

# OPTIONAL
targets$Sample_ID <- samNames # generates Sample_ID column if doesn't exist
targets$Sample_Group <- targets[,col_other]

## Adds pals high contrast colors per group by type --------
targets <- gb$colorTargets(targets, selectedVars) 

write.csv(targets, file="samplesheet.csv", quote=F, row.names=F)
targets <- read.csv("samplesheet.csv", strip.white=T, row.names=NULL)
if(class(targets)!="data.frame"){targets<- as.data.frame(targets)}

## Assign Target idat basename using col_sentrix --------
sentrixColumn <- grepl(col_sentrix, colnames(targets))
targets$Basename <- file.path(gb$runDir, targets[, sentrixColumn]) # writes path to idat files
assign("runDir",runDir); assign("targets", targets)
```

## Sample Types from Sample Sheet Above
```{r, label='Input Params2', echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, cache=FALSE, error=FALSE, out.width='25%'}
samCount <- as.data.frame(table(targets[,col_samTypes]),row.names = NULL)
colnames(samCount) <- c("Sample Type", "Freq")
gb$smallTab(samCount)
```

```{r, label='Output and Data Names', echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, cache=FALSE, error=FALSE}
if(anyDuplicated(samNames) > 0){
  message("Sample IDs contain duplicates, assigning unique names")
  samNames <- targets$Sample_ID = make.unique(samNames, sep="_")
  }
# FUN: Filter out any groups or sample types ---------------------------
samTypes <- targets[ ,col_samTypes]
samGroup <- targets[ ,col_samGroup]
#unique(samTypes) #"Conventional"  "Low-Grade"   "High-Grade"  
#unique(samGroup) #"tumorA" "tumorB" "tumorC"
```

```{r, label='copy idat files', echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, cache=FALSE, error=FALSE, include=F}
# Input paths to idat directories
gb$get.idats(csvNam = samsheet, clin.idat = "/Volumes/molecular/MOLECULAR/iScan", rsch.idat = "/Volumes/snudem01labspace/idats")
```

```{r,label='Get the RGSet and plot MDS', echo=FALSE, message=TRUE, warning=FALSE, cache=FALSE, error=FALSE, include=FALSE}
#stopifnot(getwd()==runDir)

if(file.exists(rgOut)) {
  RGSet <- readRDS(rgOut)
} else {
  RGSet <- gb$getRgset(rgOut, targets)
  saveRDS(RGSet, file = rgOut)
}

if (file.exists(rawBetaFi)) {
  betas <- readRDS(rawBetaFi)
} else {
  betas <- gb$cleanRawProbes(rawBetaFi, RGSet, samNames, targets)
  saveRDS(betas, file = rawBetaFi)
}

theMissing <- gb$dropBadQc(targets, betas)

targets <- as.data.frame(read.csv("samplesheet.csv", strip.white=T, row.names=NULL))
targets$Sample_ID <- colnames(betas)
assign("runDir",runDir)
assign("targets", targets)

targets1 <- targets #[targets$Type!="PRNRP",] #targets$Type!="Papillary adenoma"&

selectSams <- RGSet@colData@listData[[col_sentrix]][RGSet@colData@listData[["Sample_ID"]] %in%  colnames(betas)]

if (!file.exists(supbetaOut)) {
  superbetas <- gb$getSupervise(betas, RGSet[, RGSet@colData@rownames %in% selectSams], topVar = 1:10000) # supervised dmp
  saveRDS(superbetas, file = supbetaOut)
} else{
  superbetas <- readRDS(supbetaOut)
}

```

# MDS plot
```{r, label='show mds', echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, cache=FALSE, error=FALSE, include=TRUE, include=FALSE, eval = FALSE}

mbfile <- "mSetSq.beta.rds"

if(file.exists(mbfile)) {
  mSetSq.beta <- readRDS(mbfile)
} else{
  mSetSq.beta <- suppressWarnings(gb$getMdsPlot(RGSet, samNames, samTypes))
  saveRDS(mSetSq.beta, mbfile)
}

myColors <- RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(length(unique(samTypes)), "Dark2")
names(myColors) <- unique(samTypes)
color_easy = c(myColors)[samTypes]

limma::plotMDS(
  mSetSq.beta,
  top = topN,
  gene.selection = "common",
  main = mdsTitle,
  col = color_easy,
  #labels = samNames,
  pch=15
)
graphics::legend(
  "topleft",
  legend = c(names(myColors)),
  col = paste(as.list(myColors)),
  pch = 15,
  cex = 0.8
)

```

## Poor Quality Dropped Samples
```{r, label='Any missing cases Table', echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, cache=FALSE, error=FALSE, out.width='50%'}
#if(!is.null(theMissing)){
gb$smallTab(theMissing[1:4])
#}
```

<hr size="8" width="90%" color="seagreen">

# TSNE Plots 1
```{r, label='TSNE plot functions', echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
#allBetas <- list(unBetas[1:100,], unBetas[1:1000,], unBetas, superbetas[1:100,], superbetas[1:1000,], superbetas)
#allBetas <- allBetas[1:3] # Unsupervised Only
library(parallel)
library(foreach)
library(iterators)
library(doParallel)

tsne_titles <- gb$generateTitles(clusterTitle, topTitle=as.character(varProbes), titleMain)
#tsne_titles <- tsne_titles[1:3]

gb$tierBetas <- function(betas, col_sentrix, RGSet, batchCorrect = F,getSuper = F) {
    selectSams <-
      RGSet@colData@listData[[col_sentrix]][RGSet@colData@listData[["Sample_ID"]] %in%  colnames(betas)]
    if (batchCorrect == T) {
      unBetas <-
        gb$batchCorrectBs(betas, RGSet[, RGSet@colData@rownames %in% selectSams], topVar = 1:10000)
      superbetas <-
        gb$batchCorrectBs(betas, RGSet[, RGSet@colData@rownames %in% selectSams], topVar = 1:10000, T)
    } else{
      unBetas <- gb$takeTopVariance(betas, topVar = 1:10000)
    }
    if (getSuper == T) {
      superbetas <- gb$getSupervise(betas, RGSet[, RGSet@colData@rownames %in% selectSams], topVar = 1:10000)
      return(superbetas)
    } else{
      return(unBetas)
    }
}

```

```{r, label='ggplotly loader', include=FALSE, cache=FALSE}
require("tidyverse")
require("plotly")
require("ggplot2")
htmltools::tagList(plotly::ggplotly(ggplot2::ggplot()))
par(ask=F); devAskNewPage(ask = F)
```

## All groups Unsupervised TSNE 1 {.tabset}
```{r, label='TSNE plot1', echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis', cache=FALSE, error=FALSE, fig.keep='all', fig.height=10, fig.width=10, fig.asp=0.75, dpi=200, eval=FALSE}

assignColors2 <- function(targets, varColumns = c("Type","Origin"), col_vect = NULL) {
    if (is.null(col_vect)) {col_vect <- pals::glasbey()}
    #col_vect <- col_vect[sample(1:length(col_vect))]
    col_vect[6] = "#eb7d34" #changing dark forest to orange color
    dat <- targets[,varColumns] # varColumns
    colours <- col_vect[1:(length(unique(dat)))]
    anno_df <- data.frame(dat)
    vars2Color <- as.list(lapply(dat, unique))
    colorValues <-lapply(vars2Color, function(x) {x = (col_vect)[1:(length(x))]})
    for (x in 1:length(vars2Color)) {
        for (varNum in 1:length(vars2Color[x])) {names(colorValues[x][[1]]) = c(vars2Color[x][[1]])}
    }
    if(all(names(colorValues)==names(anno_df))){return(gb$getHeatAnno(colorValues,anno_df))}
}



rownames(targets1) <- 1:nrow(targets1)

gb$subsetBetas(
  targFilter = targets1[col_samGroup],
  samGroup = targets1$Type,
  betas = betas,
  targets = targets1,
  samNames = targets1[,col_samNames],
  tsne_titles = tsne_titles[1:3]
)

cat("Right Click to Save Images")
```

<hr size="5" width="90%" color="gray">

## Interactive TSNE 1 with hover-on labels (Same as previous plot) {.tabset} 
```{r, label='TSNE plot1aa', echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis', cache=FALSE, error=FALSE, fig.keep='all', fig.height=10, fig.width=10, fig.asp=0.75, dpi=200, plotly=TRUE, out.width="100%", eval=FALSE}
gb$subsetBetas(
  targFilter = targets1[col_samGroup],
  samGroup = targets1$Type,
  betas = betas, #[,targets1$Sample_ID]
  targets = targets1,
  samNames = targets1[,col_samNames],
  tsne_titles = tsne_titles[1:3],
  doPlotly = T
)
```

<hr size="5" width="90%" color="gray"></hr>

## All groups Supervised TSNE 2 {.tabset}
```{r, label='TSNE plot2', echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis', cache=FALSE, error=FALSE, fig.keep='all', fig.height=10, fig.width=10, fig.asp=0.75, dpi=200, eval=FALSE}
rownames(targets1) <- 1:nrow(targets1)

gb$subsetBetas(
  targFilter = targets1[col_samGroup],
  samGroup = targets1$Type,
  betas = superbetas,
  targets = targets1,
  samNames = targets1[,col_samNames],
  tsne_titles = tsne_titles[4:6]
)

cat("Right Click to Save Images")
```

## Interactive TSNE 2 with hover-on labels (Same as previous plot) {.tabset} 
```{r, label='TSNE plot1b', echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis', cache=FALSE, error=FALSE, fig.keep='all', fig.height=10, fig.width=10, fig.asp=0.75, dpi=200, plotly=TRUE, out.width="100%", eval=FALSE}
gb$subsetBetas(
  targFilter = targets1[col_samGroup],
  samGroup = targets1$Type,
  betas = superbetas, #[,targets1$Sample_ID]
  targets = targets1,
  samNames = targets1[,col_samNames],
  tsne_titles = tsne_titles[4:6],
  doPlotly = T
)
```

# HeatMaps
```{r, label='heatmap function2', echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, class.source="bg-success", cache=FALSE, error=FALSE, results='hide', fig.keep='all'}
#, fig.height=10, fig.width=16, fig.asp=0.75
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(ComplexHeatmap))
require("ComplexHeatmap")
gb$assignColors = gb$assignColors2
betas1 <- betas[,targets1$Sample_ID]
unBetas <- gb$tierBetas(betas1, col_sentrix, RGSet)
ha <- gb$assignColors2(targets1, varColumns=selectedVars)

if(file.exists(annotFi)) {
  annot <- readRDS(annotFi)
} else {
  annot <- minfi::getAnnotation(RGSet)
  saveRDS(annot, file = annotFi)
}

addGeneName <- function(annot, oldBeta) {
  rownames(oldBeta) <- paste(
    annot[rownames(oldBeta), "UCSC_RefGene_Name"], rownames(oldBeta), sep = "_")
  return(oldBeta)
}

```

```{r, label='Calc heatmap 1', echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, class.source="bg-success", cache=FALSE, error=FALSE}
unBetas <- addGeneName(annot, unBetas)
#ht_opt$message = FALSE
options(bitmapType='cairo')
```
## All groups HeatMap 1 (Unsupervised) {.tabset}
```{r, label='all heatmap 1', echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, cache=FALSE, error=FALSE, results='asis', fig.keep='all'}

for (topNum in varProbes[1:2]) {
  csvName = paste("Top",topNum,"_variance_heatmap_unsuper.csv", sep="_")
  betaRanges = unBetas[1:topNum,]
  if(!file.exists(csvName)){write.csv(x=betaRanges, file = csvName)}
  cat(paste("###", "Top", topNum,"\n\n"))
  titleValue <- paste("Top", topNum, "Variance Probes Beta Values")
  png(filename = paste("Top", topNum,"heatmap.png",sep="_"))
  gb$getHeatMap(betaRanges, titleValue, ha)
  dev.off()
  cat('\n\n')
}
```

## All groups HeatMap 2 (Supervised) {.tabset}
```{r, label='all heatmap 2', echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, class.source="bg-success", cache=FALSE, error=FALSE, results='asis', fig.keep='all', fig.height=16, fig.width=10, fig.asp=0.65, eval=FALSE}
#library("Biobase")
#require("Biobase")
library("minfi")
require("minfi")
#
betas2 <- betas[,targets1$Sample_ID]
superbetas2 <- gb$tierBetas(betas2, col_sentrix, RGSet, batchCorrect = F, getSuper = T)
ha <- gb$assignColors2(targets1, varColumns=selectedVars)

superbetas2 <- addGeneName(annot, superbetas2)
#write.csv(x=superbetas2[1:100,], file = "Top_100_variance_heatmap_supervised.csv")

for (topNum in varProbes) {
  cat(paste("###", "Top", topNum,"\n\n"))
  ttle <- paste("Top", topNum, "Variance Probes Beta Values")
  gb$getHeatMap(betaRanges = superbetas2[1:topNum,], titleValue = ttle, ha=ha)
  cat('\n\n')
}
```


```{r, label='segfile generation', echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, class.source="bg-success", cache=FALSE, error=FALSE, results='hide', fig.keep='all', fig.height=8, fig.width=15, fig.asp=0.75, include=FALSE, eval = FALSE}
cat("# Copy Number Plots")

data(geneList)
gsetFile <- paste0("gsetfunnorm",td,".rds")
gBetaFile  <- paste0("gsetbeta",td,".rds")
ClusfiNam <- paste0("dmp_",td,".csv")
# The GDC transforms copy number values into segment mean--equal to log2(copy-number/ 2).
# https://docs.gdc.cancer.gov/Data/Bioinformatics_Pipelines/CNV_Pipeline/

samplename_data <- as.character(targets$Sample_ID)
sentrix.ids <- as.character(targets$SentrixID_Pos)
samGroup <-as.character(targets$Type)

gb$writeSegTab(segFile, sentrix.ids)
cnData <- gb$grabClusterDat(seg_clust_file, segFile)
```

```{r, label='finalsave1', echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, class.source="bg-success", cache=FALSE, results='asis', error=FALSE, fig.keep='all', fig.height=5, fig.width=15, fig.asp=0.75, include=FALSE, eval = FALSE}
cat("## CNV Frequency {.tabset}")
gb$savePlotPng(cnData[,1:(ncol(cnData))], plotName = "All", "All")
```

```{r, label='finalsave', echo=FALSE, error=FALSE, fig.asp=0.75, fig.height=5, fig.keep='all', fig.width=15, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, cache=FALSE, class.source="bg-success", results='asis', include=FALSE, eval = FALSE}
grps <- unique(cnData$group)
for(samgrp in grps) {
    plotTitle <- paste0(samgrp)
    cnData2 <- gb$filterGrp(cnData, samgrp)
    gb$savePlotPng(cnData2, plotName = plotTitle, plotTitle)
}
```


```{r, label='cluster profile', echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, class.source="bg-success", cache=FALSE, error=FALSE, results='asis', fig.keep='all', fig.height=10, fig.width=10, fig.asp=0.65, include=FALSE, eval = FALSE}
cat("## Cluster Profiler {.tabset}")
gset.funnorm <-gb$grabGsetFun(gsetFile,RGSet,targets)
condition <- minfi::pData(gset.funnorm)$Sample_Group
##### Pathway Analysis#####
gene_char_unique <- gb$getDmpData(ClusfiNam, gset.funnorm, condition)

#kegg <- list(x1=ids$ENTREZID,x2=ids$ENTREZID)
#ck_kegg <- clusterProfiler::compareCluster(geneCluster = kegg, fun = "enrichKEGG" ) 
#graphics::barplot(ck_kegg)
#enrichplot::upsetplot(ck_kegg)

kk_final <- gb$entrz2kegg(gene_char_unique)
geneVals<-kk_final@result
write.csv(geneVals, file="Genes_Pathway.csv")

keep <- geneVals$qvalue< 0.05
geneVals <- geneVals[keep,]

DT::datatable(geneVals[,1:7])
```

```{r, label='cluster gene', echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, class.source="bg-success", cache=FALSE, error=FALSE, results='asis', fig.keep='all', fig.height=10, fig.width=10, fig.asp=0.65, include=FALSE, eval = FALSE}
selectPath <- geneVals$Description=="Rap1 signaling pathway"
Rap1Genes <- data.frame(str_split(geneVals[selectPath,"geneID"], "/"))
colnames(Rap1Genes) <- "Rap1 signaling pathway" 
DT::datatable(Rap1Genes)
```

```{r, label='gene pathway', echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, class.source="bg-success", cache=FALSE, error=FALSE, results='asis', fig.keep='all', fig.height=10, fig.width=10, fig.asp=0.65, include=FALSE, eval = FALSE}
## Association between genes and gene sets. Gene overlapping among different gene sets.
de <- names(geneList)[abs(geneList) > 2]
edo <- DOSE::enrichDGN(de)
edox <- kk_final #@result[kk_final@result$qvalue<0.05,]

allGenes <- NULL
for (genes in kk_final@result$geneID) {
  geneSplit <- c(data.frame(str_split(genes, "/")))
  #names(geneSplit) <-kk_final@result[kk_final@result$geneID==genes,]$Description
  allGenes <- c(allGenes,geneSplit[[1]])
}
allGenes <- table(as.data.frame(allGenes))
allGenes <- as.data.frame(allGenes)
allGenes <-allGenes[allGenes$Freq>20,]
#kk_final@result[kk_final@result$Description ==}
#p1 <- enrichplot::cnetplot(edox, foldChange=geneList)
p1 <- enrichplot::cnetplot(edox, foldChange=3)
## categorySize can be scaled by 'pvalue' or 'geneNum'
p2 <- cnetplot(edox, categorySize="pvalue", foldChange=5)
p3 <- cnetplot(edox, foldChange=5, circular = TRUE, colorEdge = TRUE) 
p3
#cowplot::plot_grid(p1, p2, p3, ncol=3, labels=LETTERS[1:3], rel_widths=c(.8, .8, 1.2))
upsetplot(edox)
```
